description_long: This house features a prominent hip roof and is surrounded by a low boundary wall enclosing a yard with both paved and grassy areas. The structure includes a large, elevated wooden deck that wraps around the front and side, accessible by a set of wide steps. The main entryway is sheltered by a covered porch supported by columns, and the facade displays a mix of rectangular and bay windows. The rear of the house opens to a driveway and a secondary entrance, with a detached small outbuilding or garage visible within the walled perimeter. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, giving the house a clean and modern suburban appearance.
description: A modern, single-story house with a hip roof, large wraparound deck, and enclosed yard, featuring a covered porch and a mix of rectangular and bay windows.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the expansive wooden deck, covered porch, and main entry steps, with grassy yard and boundary wall.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the driveway, secondary entrance, and the transition from deck to paved area within the walled yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, detached outbuilding or garage, and the back steps leading up to the deck and house.
description_view_3: Right-rear view emphasizing the bay window, side steps, and the integration of the deck with the house and yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a simple main door
